notes: All 9 Phase 2 work items validated. 13 commands, 4 skills + 1 language pack, 4 agents, 2 rules, 7 hooks, 1 migrator, 1 template. Config injection present in all commands and agents. No hard-coded project references. POSIX sh compliance across all shell scripts. Minor: leftover .gitkeep in templates/.

A1: pr-gate.sh format command stderr suppressed with 2>/dev/null||true — silent failure violates never-swallow-errors spirit. A2: review-gate.sh uses index-based iteration instead of while-read from spec — positive deviation avoids subshell variable loss. A3: hooks use jq extensively but no explicit jq dependency check in preamble — missing jq produces opaque error instead of harness: prefixed message.
